skin.description: Dark brown melanated skin, NOT fair, NOT pale, NOT tanned — DARK

headband.description: Thin BLACK headband with TWO sharp angular wing/leaf-shaped prongs rising upward at angles — like butterfly wings or feather fins. Dark navy-black color. The prongs are the KEY identifying feature — they must be prominent, pointed, and angular.
headband.criticalNote: This is the #1 most-flagged item. The prongs must be LARGE, SHARP, and VISIBLE. Not small bumps. Not a bow. Not horns. Two angular wing shapes.

outfit.description: White fur wrap coat, dark brown boots
